name: texor
description: Open the TEXOR browser workbench from VSCode and revise LaTeX manuscripts through PDF feedback with TEXOR Agent, Codex CLI, or Claude Code.

untrustedWorkspaces.description: You can open the TEXOR browser workbench in restricted mode, but project automation works best after trusting the workspace.

texor.appPath.description: Optional override for the TEXOR application directory. Leave empty to use the app bundled inside this extension.

texor.codexExecutable.description: Codex CLI executable used for browser-submitted tasks.

texor.codexModel.description: Default Codex model used for browser-submitted tasks.

texor.codexReasoningEffort.description: Default Codex reasoning effort used for browser-submitted tasks.

texor.claudeExecutable.description: Claude Code CLI executable used for browser-submitted tasks.

texor.claudeModel.description: Optional Claude model override passed to Claude Code.

texor.agentBaseUrl.description: OpenAI-compatible base URL for TEXOR Agent.

texor.agentModel.description: Model name used by TEXOR Agent.

texor.agentImageModel.description: Image generation model used by TEXOR Agent for structure diagrams.

texor.agentApiKey.description: API key used by TEXOR Agent. Prefer setting this in user settings or the browser workbench.
